hero.subtitle: An ecosystem of tools for integrating, processing, and analyzing health, climate, and environment data in Brazil.
about.title: What is ClimaSUS?
about.body: ClimaSUS is an ecosystem of scientific software tools for obtaining, integrating, standardizing, and analyzing health, climate, and environmental data in Brazil, with a focus on bioclimatic forecasting. Developed within the scope of INCT Conexão and the Center for Climate and Health of Rondônia (CCSRO–Fiocruz), the ecosystem automates the complete epidemiological workflow — from data acquisition from DATASUS to time series ready for climate modeling and health surveillance.
packages.title: Ecosystem libraries
packages.subtitle: R and Python tools for every step of the analysis.
phases.title: Five integrated phases
phases.subtitle: From raw data to intelligence for public health policies.
phases.phase1.title: Phase 1 — Data Infrastructure
phases.phase1.desc: Parallel acquisition, cleaning, multilingual standardization, ICD-10 filtering, epidemiological variable creation, flexible temporal aggregation, and metadata-rich export.
phases.phase2.title: Phase 2 — Socioeconomic Integration
phases.phase2.desc: Spatial linking of geographic boundaries, IBGE data integration (population, GDP, HDI), and population-weighted spatial operations.
phases.phase3.title: Phase 3 — Climate Integration
phases.phase3.desc: Import of meteorological data (INMET, FIORES, INCT-CONEXÃO), air quality, satellite data, and climate exposure matching algorithms.
phases.phase4.title: Phase 4 — Advanced Spatial Analysis
phases.phase4.desc: Bayesian spatial models, cluster detection (SaTScan, Kulldorff), local spatial autocorrelation indicators (LISA), and spatial regressions.
phases.phase5.title: Phase 5 — Temporal and Predictive Modeling
phases.phase5.desc: DLNM models, attributable fraction, time series decomposition, machine learning, and bioclimatic prognosis based on climate scenarios.
team.title: Who we are
team.subtitle: Developed by experts dedicated to the intersection of climate and public health.
funding.title: Funding and support
funding.body: The ClimaSUS project is funded by the Ministry of Health and the Oswaldo Cruz Foundation Rondônia (Fiocruz-RO), through the Center for Climate and Health of Rondônia (CCSRO), within the scope of INCT-CONEXAO, CNPq process No. 408474/2024-6.
cta.title: Start using ClimaSUS today
cta.subtitle: Transform climate and health data into intelligence for public policies.

architecture.subtitle: Vertical layers — from raw data to intelligence for public policies.
